title: stenogyne remyi
intro: Stenogyne remyi, also known as the Hawaiian Mountain Mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, native to Hawaii. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Stenogyne remyi include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in oil to be used topically, allowing users to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
